task_completion.description: Agent logged into the Jenkins instance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Jenkins dashboard is visible in a web browser, indicating successful login (e.g., access to the main dashboard or 'admin' user profile visible).

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the 'Payment-Service' job page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the Jenkins project page for 'Payment-Service', displaying the project details and the build history list on the left side.

task_completion.description: Agent inspected the console output of failed builds to check for the specific exception.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the 'Console Output' page of at least one build, with log text visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Agent wrote the identified build numbers to the required output file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., nano, gedit) or terminal command (e.g., echo) shows a comma-separated list of numbers being written to or saved in '/home/ga/timeout_builds.txt'.

integrity.description: Agent did not access the ground truth file to find the answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal command or text editor shows the agent opening, reading, or copying from '/root/truth_timeout_builds.txt'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Jenkins web interface to inspect the logs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Jenkins GUI in a browser being navigated to view build logs, rather than the agent reading Jenkins internal backend files directly from the terminal.

integrity.description: Agent formatted the output correctly as comma-separated numbers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The output file contains only numbers separated by commas (e.g., '1,4,5'), without extra text, explanations, or copy-pasted task instructions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Jenkins instance is running at http://localhost:8080. The job name is 'Payment-Service' and it has 8 generated builds. The target error to identify is 'java.net.SocketTimeoutException'. The final output must be a comma-separated list of build numbers saved in '/home/ga/timeout_builds.txt'. The ground truth is stored in '/root/truth_timeout_builds.txt' which the agent must not access.
